children.heading: .—Contractor
children.label: 1 .—Contractor
children.text: The term “contractor” means the department, division, or other unit of a person responsible for the performance under the contract.

children.heading: .—Controlled substance
children.label: 2 .—Controlled substance
children.text: The term “controlled substance” means a controlled substance in schedules I through V of section 202 of the Comprehensive Drug Abuse Prevention and Control Act of 1970 ().21 U.S.C. 812

children.heading: .—Conviction
children.label: 3 .—Conviction
children.text: The term “conviction” means a finding of guilt (including a plea of nolo contendere), an imposition of sentence, or both, by a judicial body charged with the responsibility to determine violations of Federal or State criminal drug statutes.

children.heading: .—Criminal drug statute
children.label: 4 .—Criminal drug statute
children.text: The term “criminal drug statute” means a criminal statute involving manufacture, distribution, dispensation, use, or possession of a controlled substance.

children.label: A
children.text: for the performance of work done in connection with a specific contract or grant described in section 8102 or 8103 of this title; and

children.label: B
children.text: at which employees of the entity are prohibited from engaging in the unlawful manufacture, distribution, dispensation, possession, or use of a controlled substance in accordance with the requirements of the Anti-Drug Abuse Act of 1988 (, ).Public Law 100–690102 Stat. 4181

children.heading: .—Employee
children.label: 6 .—Employee
children.text: The term “employee” means the employee of a contractor or grantee directly engaged in the performance of work pursuant to the contract or grant described in section 8102 or 8103 of this title.

children.heading: .—Federal agency
children.label: 7 .—Federal agency
children.text: The term “Federal agency” means an agency as defined in .section 552(f) of title 5

children.heading: .—Grantee
children.label: 8 .—Grantee
children.text: The term “grantee” means the department, division, or other unit of a person responsible for the performance under the grant.

children.heading: .—Construction
children.label: b .—Construction
children.text: This chapter does not require law enforcement agencies to comply with this chapter if the head of the agency determines it would be inappropriate in connection with the agency’s undercover operations.
